title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
